name: Hyperbolic AI Inference API
what_it_does: Open-access AI inference marketplace with REST API providing LLM completions, image generation, and audio transcription via OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Uses decentralized GPU marketplace for cost-efficient inference.
use_cases: Running open-source LLM inference at low cost via decentralized GPU marketplace
Image generation via Stable Diffusion and FLUX models through OpenAI-compatible API
Audio transcription via Whisper API-compatible endpoint
Building multi-modal AI pipelines with text, image, and audio in one provider
Cost-sensitive batch inference workloads where per-token cost matters
not_for: Production systems requiring strict SLA guarantees (decentralized infra has variability)
Proprietary model access (only open-source models available)
best_when: An agent needs cost-effective multi-modal inference (text + image + audio) from a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint with open-source models.
avoid_when: You need enterprise SLA, consistent latency, or proprietary models — use Anthropic, OpenAI, or managed inference providers.

auth.notes: API key from Hyperbolic dashboard. Bearer token in Authorization header. OpenAI-compatible API — existing clients work with base URL change.

pricing.paid_tiers: LLM inference from $0.10-1.00/M tokens; image gen from $0.02-0.05/image
pricing.notes: Competitive pricing through decentralized GPU marketplace. Multi-modal pricing includes text, image, and audio. Free credit on signup for testing.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by model and GPU availability

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAI-compatible API surface reduces documentation friction. Image generation API documented separately. Error responses follow OpenAI format for chat endpoints. Documentation still maturing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Inference calls are stateless. Same prompt with same seed produces deterministic image generation output.
known_agent_gotchas: Decentralized GPU pool can have variable availability — cold start delays possible
Image generation and LLM are on separate base URLs — agents need multi-endpoint handling
OpenAI SDK compatible but model names use Hyperbolic-specific identifiers
Newer platform — reliability and documentation quality still improving

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Standard API key auth. Decentralized infrastructure introduces variable trust model for compute nodes. No compliance certifications yet — early-stage company.
